rulings.Case Title: CHARLES GILPIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further Discovery Responses
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, April 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Goodyear Tire and Rubber Company¿s motion to compel production of documents related to plaintiffs claims to asbestos-related trusts without payment of a $.45 per page scanning/copying charge is granted. (See San Diego Unifed Port Dist. V. Douglas E. Barnhat, Inc. (2002) 95 Cal. App. 4th 1400, 1404 [¿[P]arties are expected to bear expenses typically involved in responding to discovery requests, such as the expense of producing documents.¿) Defendant¿s request for monetary sanctions is denied as Plaintiff acted with substantial justification. =(220/JJM)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD REENTS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Rockwell Automation, Inc. And Otis Elevator Companys Notice Of Motion To Compel Pathology Materials For Testing
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, April 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. DEFENDANTS ROCKWELL AUTOMATION, INC. and OTIS ELEVATOR COMPANY's Motion To Compel Pathology Materials For Testing is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/JJM)
